# Vertex AI Release Notes - Feature Announcements

## April 17, 2026
- **RAG Cross Corpus Retrieval (public preview)** — Enables simultaneous retrieval from multiple knowledge bases

## April 14, 2026
- **Claude Opus 4.7** — Introduced in Model Garden as latest Anthropic offering

## April 13, 2026
- **Visualization cells GA** — Generally available for Colab Enterprise, allowing interactive chart generation

## April 10, 2026
- **SQL cells GA** — Colab Enterprise GA status for direct query execution

## April 6, 2026
- **Schema-based metadata filtering** — Added to RAG Engine for enhanced context retrieval

## April 3, 2026
- **Gemma 4 26B A4B IT** — Launches experimentally as multimodal model
- **Vertex AI RAG Engine Serverless Mode** — Public preview of fully managed database

## April 2, 2026
- **Veo 3.1 Lite** — Released in public preview as cost-efficient video generation model
- **Gemini 2.5 Model Retirement Update** — Postponed to October 16, 2026

## March 25, 2026
- **Lyria 3 Audio Generation** — lyria-3-pro-preview (184 sec) and lyria-3-clip-preview (30 sec)

## March 24, 2026
- **Image Generation Endpoint Deprecations** — Imagen 3.0/4.0 discontinued June 30, 2026
- **Video Generation Endpoint Deprecations** — Veo 3.0 and 2.0 models deprecated

## March 16, 2026
- Vertex Explainable AI marked as deprecated

## March 12, 2026
- Partner model evaluation support for Anthropic and Llama models

## March 5, 2026
- Vector Search 2.0 generally available (collections, auto-embeddings, hybrid search)

## March 3, 2026
- Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite released as most cost-efficient Gemini model

## February 26, 2026
- Gemini 3.1 Flash Image preview

## February 19, 2026
- Gemini 3.1 Pro preview with 1M token context window

## February 18, 2026
- Vertex AI Agent Engine Code Execution generally available

## February 17, 2026
- Claude Sonnet 4.6 available as partner model

## February 10, 2026
- GLM 5 introduced experimentally for systems engineering and agentic task workflows

## February 4, 2026
- Claude Opus 4.6 available as partner model

## January 23, 2026
- Virtual Try-On model GA

## Last Fetched
2026-04-19 — New entries: Cross Corpus Retrieval (Apr 17), Claude Opus 4.7 (Apr 14), Visualization cells GA (Apr 13), SQL cells GA (Apr 10), Schema-based metadata filtering (Apr 6), Gemma 4 26B A4B IT (Apr 3)
